name: weftos
description: WeftOS in Claude Code — kernel control (boot/status/services), knowledge graph (graphify), ECC cognitive substrate (search/calibrate), agent fleet (clawft, weftos-kernel, weftos-mesh, weftos-ecc), and 9 first-class skills. Backed by `weft mcp-server` so the entire weft CLI surface is callable as MCP tools.
